scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:tenant" "npm run dev:admission" "npm run dev:student" "npm run dev:academic" "npm run dev:attendance" "npm run dev:finance" "npm run dev:exam" "npm run dev:hr" "npm run dev:comm"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix services/auth-service && npm install --prefix services/tenant-service && npm install --prefix services/admission-service && npm install --prefix services/student-service && npm install --prefix services/academic-service && npm install --prefix services/attendance-service && npm install --prefix services/finance-service && npm install --prefix services/exam-service && npm install --prefix services/hr-payroll-service && npm install --prefix services/communication-service
